data.requirement: Combine all tables (Status_Analysis, Customer_Info, Payment_Info, Service_Options, Online_Services, Location_Data) using customer_id to create a unified customer profile dataset
data.reason: Original requirement missed critical service/geographic tables needed for visualizations V2/V4 and interactions I1/I3/I4. Full join enables complete analysis of service patterns impacting churn.

data.requirement: Calculate normalized metrics: CLTV/tenure ratio and monthly_charges/avg_monthly_gb_download (require joining Service_Options)
data.reason: Original metric calculation was impossible without Service_Options data. Revised requirement ensures access to avg_monthly_gb_download from Service_Options table.

data.requirement: Enrich geospatial analysis with city-level population data and service adoption rates
data.reason: Original latitude/longitude bins alone lack business context. Adding population and service metrics enables meaningful geographic pattern analysis.

visualization.requirement: Small multiples heat maps showing service-churn patterns per customer_status group
visualization.reason: Single heat map would overcrowd categories (6 churn_categories x 3 internet_types x 3 contracts). Small multiples improve readability across segments.

visualization.requirement: Vertical box plots showing CLTV distribution by customer_status with age overlay using color gradient
visualization.reason: Original small multiples with age deciles would create 30+ charts. Continuous color encoding preserves age relationship more effectively.

interaction.requirement: Dynamic query sliders for CLTV/tenure ratio ranges with live histogram previews
interaction.reason: Original tenure-only filter ignored the normalized metric that's more relevant to CLTV analysis
